en: At that time Herod the tetrarch heard about the fame of Jesus,
zh: 那時，分封王希律聽見耶穌的名聲，

en: and he said to his servants, "This is John the Baptist. He has been raised from the dead; that is why these miraculous powers are at work in him."
zh: 就對臣僕說：“這人是施洗的約翰，他從死人中復活，所以他身上有行神蹟的能力。”

en: For Herod had seized John and bound him and put him in prison for the sake of Herodias, his brother Philip's wife,
zh: 原來希律為了他弟弟腓力的妻子希羅底的緣故，拘捕了約翰，把他捆綁，關在監裡，

en: because John had been saying to him, "It is not lawful for you to have her."
zh: 因為約翰多次告訴他：“你佔有她是不合理的。”

en: And though he wanted to put him to death, he feared the people, because they held him to be a prophet.
zh: 他想殺約翰，但又害怕群眾，因為他們都認為約翰是個先知。

en: But when Herod's birthday came, the daughter of Herodias danced before the company and pleased Herod,
zh: 到了希律生日的那天，希羅底的女兒在眾人面前跳舞，希律非常高興，

en: so that he promised with an oath to give her whatever she might ask.
zh: 就起誓答應她，無論求甚麼都給她。

en: Prompted by her mother, she said, "Give me the head of John the Baptist here on a platter."
zh: 她在母親的慫恿之下，說：“請把施洗的約翰的頭放在盤子上給我。”

en: And the king was sorry, but because of his oaths and his guests he commanded it to be given.
zh: 王就憂愁，但因為誓言和在座的賓客，就下令給她。

en: He sent and had John beheaded in the prison,
zh: 他派人去，在監裡斬了約翰的頭，

en: and his head was brought on a platter and given to the girl, and she brought it to her mother.
zh: 把頭放在盤子上，拿來給那女孩子，她又帶給母親。

en: And his disciples came and took the body and buried it, and they went and told Jesus.
zh: 約翰的門徒前來，領了屍體，把它埋葬，然後去告訴耶穌。

en: Now when Jesus heard this, he withdrew from there in a boat to a desolate place by himself. But when the crowds heard it, they followed him on foot from the towns.
zh: 耶穌聽見了，就離開那裡，獨自坐船到曠野去。群眾聽見了，就從各城步行來跟隨他。

en: When he went ashore he saw a great crowd, and he had compassion on them and healed their sick.
zh: 耶穌上了岸，看見一大群人，就憐憫他們，醫好了他們的病人。

en: Now when it was evening, the disciples came to him and said, "This is a desolate place, and the day is now over; send the crowds away to go into the villages and buy food for themselves."
zh: 黃昏的時候，門徒前來對他說：“這是曠野的地方，時間也不早了，請叫群眾散開，好讓他們往村裡去，買自己的食物吧。”

en: But Jesus said, "They need not go away; you give them something to eat."
zh: 耶穌回答：“他們用不著離開，你們給他們吃吧！”

en: They said to him, "We have only five loaves here and two fish."
zh: 但門徒說：“我們這裡除了五個餅和兩條魚，甚麼也沒有。”

en: And he said, "Bring them here to me."
zh: 他說：“拿過來給我。”

en: Then he ordered the crowds to sit down on the grass, and taking the five loaves and the two fish, he looked up to heaven and said a blessing. Then he broke the loaves and gave them to the disciples, and the disciples gave them to the crowds.
zh: 於是吩咐群眾坐在草地上，拿起那五個餅兩條魚，望著天，祝謝了；然後把餅擘開，遞給門徒，門徒又分給群眾。

en: And they all ate and were satisfied. And they took up twelve baskets full of the broken pieces left over.
zh: 大家都吃了，並且吃飽了，他們把剩下的零碎拾起來，裝滿了十二個籃子。

en: And those who ate were about five thousand men, besides women and children.
zh: 吃的人，除了婦女和孩子，約有五千。

en: Immediately he made the disciples get into the boat and go before him to the other side, while he dismissed the crowds.
zh: 耶穌立刻催門徒上船，叫他們先到對岸去，他卻留下來叫群眾散開。

en: And after he had dismissed the crowds, he went up on the mountain by himself to pray. When evening came, he was there alone,
zh: 他解散了群眾，就獨自上山去禱告。到了晚上，他還是獨自一人在那裡。

en: but the boat by this time was a long way from the land, beaten by the waves, for the wind was against them.
zh: 那時門徒的船已經離岸數公里，因為逆風，被波浪沖擊。

en: And in the fourth watch of the night he came to them, walking on the sea.
zh: 天快亮的時候 ，耶穌在海面上向他們走過去。

en: But when the disciples saw him walking on the sea, they were terrified, and said, "It is a ghost!" and they cried out in fear.
zh: 門徒見他在海面上行走，就很驚慌，說：“有鬼啊！”並且恐懼得大叫起來。

en: But immediately Jesus spoke to them, saying, "Take heart; it is I. Do not be afraid."
zh: 耶穌立刻對他們說：“放心吧！是我，不要怕。”

en: And Peter answered him, "Lord, if it is you, command me to come to you on the water."
zh: 彼得對他說：“主啊，如果是你，讓我在水面上到你那裡去。”

en: He said, "Come." So Peter got out of the boat and walked on the water and came to Jesus.
zh: 他說：“來吧！”彼得就從船上下來，行在水面上，走向耶穌那裡去。

en: But when he saw the wind, he was afraid, and beginning to sink he cried out, "Lord, save me."
zh: 但他一見風浪就害怕，快要沉下去的時候，就呼叫：“主啊！救我！”

en: Jesus immediately reached out his hand and took hold of him, saying to him, "O you of little faith, why did you doubt?"
zh: 耶穌馬上伸手拉住他，對他說：“小信的人哪，為甚麼疑惑？”

en: And when they got into the boat, the wind ceased.
zh: 他們上了船，風就平靜了。

en: And those in the boat worshiped him, saying, "Truly you are the Son of God."
zh: 船上的人都拜他，說：“你真是 神的兒子。”

en: And when they had crossed over, they came to land at Gennesaret.
zh: 他們過到對岸，來到革尼撒勒的地區。

en: And when the men of that place recognized him, they sent around to all that region and brought to him all who were sick
zh: 那地的人認出是耶穌，就把消息傳遍了那一帶。眾人把一切有病的人都帶來，

en: and implored him that they might only touch the fringe of his garment. And as many as touched it were made well.
zh: 求耶穌讓他們只摸一摸他衣服的繸子，摸著的人就都痊愈了。
